seo.title: SEO Services | Search Everywhere Optimization | Single Grain
seo.description: Get found everywhere. Technical SEO, AI-powered content, and multi-surface optimization. We help you rank on Google, AI engines, and emerging search platforms.

hero.headline: SEO / Organic Growth
hero.subheadline: Get found everywhere your audience searches
hero.description: Modern SEO isn't just Google. It's visibility across search engines, AI surfaces, social platforms, and communities. We build systems that get you found everywhere.

sections.title: Search Everywhere Optimization
sections.content:
Discovery happens across platforms. Google, Bing, Perplexity, ChatGPT, Reddit, YouTube, LinkedIn—your audience searches everywhere. We optimize for all of it.

We call it 'Search Everywhere Optimization.' It's technical SEO, content strategy, and AI engine optimization rolled into one integrated system. You don't need separate strategies for each platform—you need one system that works across all surfaces.

sections.title: What You Get
sections.content:
Technical SEO audit and optimization
AI-powered content strategy and production
LLM optimization for AI search engines
Programmatic SEO for scale
Link building and authority development
Multi-surface visibility tracking
Weekly performance reporting
Continuous iteration and improvement

sections.title: How It Works
sections.content:
We start with a comprehensive audit. Technical issues, content gaps, competitive positioning—we map it all.

Then we build. Content systems, technical fixes, optimization workflows. We use AI to accelerate production without sacrificing quality.

We ship fast. Weekly content, continuous technical improvements, rapid iteration.

We measure everything. Traffic, rankings, conversions, revenue. Clear reporting, clear ROI.

sections.title: Expected Outcomes
sections.content:
Increased organic traffic across all search surfaces
Higher rankings on Google and AI engines
More qualified leads from organic search
Better brand visibility where your audience searches
Measurable ROI tied to business outcomes

cta.headline: Ready to Get Found Everywhere?
cta.description: Let's build your organic growth engine.

seo.description: Data-driven paid campaigns across Google, Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok, and emerging platforms. Maximum ROI, minimum waste. Performance marketing that scales.

hero.headline: Paid Media / Performance Marketing
hero.subheadline: Scalable paid campaigns that drive revenue
hero.description: We run paid campaigns that work. Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok—we optimize where your audience is. Data-driven, AI-enhanced, ROI-focused.

sections.title: Multi-Platform Performance
sections.content:
Your audience is everywhere. So are we. We build integrated paid media strategies that work across Google, Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, and emerging platforms.

We don't just run campaigns—we build systems. Automated bid optimization, AI-powered creative testing, advanced attribution modeling. Everything optimized for ROI.

sections.title: What You Get
sections.content:
Multi-platform campaign management
Advanced audience targeting and segmentation
AI-powered bid optimization
Creative testing and optimization
Attribution modeling and reporting
Performance tracking and analysis
Weekly optimization cadence
Clear ROI reporting

sections.title: How It Works
sections.content:
We start with strategy. Audience research, platform selection, budget allocation. We map the entire customer journey.

Then we build. Campaigns, ad sets, creatives. We use AI to generate and test variations faster.

We optimize continuously. Daily monitoring, weekly optimization, monthly strategy reviews. Data-driven decisions, not guesswork.

We report clearly. ROAS, CPA, revenue attribution. You see exactly what's working and why.

sections.title: Expected Outcomes
sections.content:
Scalable lead generation across platforms
Improved ROAS and lower CPA
Better attribution and measurement
Multi-channel presence and brand visibility
Clear ROI tied to revenue

cta.headline: Ready to Scale Your Paid Media?

seo.title: Conversion Rate Optimization | CRO Services | Single Grain
seo.description: Turn traffic into revenue. Data-driven testing and optimization across your entire funnel. Higher conversions, better user experience, more revenue.

hero.headline: Conversion Rate Optimization
hero.description: We optimize every step of your user journey. Landing pages, forms, checkout flows—we test, iterate, and improve until conversions increase.

sections.title: Data-Driven Optimization
sections.content:
More traffic doesn't mean more revenue. Conversion rate optimization does. We test, measure, and optimize every step of your funnel.

We use data, not assumptions. Heatmaps, session recordings, A/B tests, user feedback. We find what's broken and fix it. Then we find what works and double down.

sections.title: What You Get
sections.content:
Conversion audit and analysis
A/B testing program and execution
Landing page optimization
Form optimization
Checkout flow improvements
User experience enhancements
Performance tracking and reporting
Continuous testing and iteration

sections.title: How It Works
sections.content:
We start with analysis. Funnel mapping, conversion tracking, user behavior analysis. We identify where you're losing conversions.

Then we test. Hypotheses, test designs, implementation. We run controlled experiments.

We measure. Results, statistical significance, business impact. We report what worked and why.

We iterate. Winning tests become permanent. Losing tests inform new hypotheses. Continuous improvement.

sections.title: Expected Outcomes
sections.content:
Higher conversion rates across your funnel
Improved user experience and engagement
More revenue from existing traffic
Better lead quality and qualification
Clear ROI from optimization investment

cta.headline: Ready to Optimize Your Conversions?
cta.description: Let's turn more of your traffic into revenue.

seo.title: Marketing Services | SEO, Paid Media, Content, CRO | Single Grain
seo.description: Integrated growth services: SEO, Paid Media, Content Marketing, and CRO. AI-forward execution that scales. Trusted by 500+ companies.

hero.headline: Integrated Growth Services
hero.subheadline: Four services that work together to drive measurable results
hero.description: We don't do siloed marketing. SEO, paid media, content, and CRO work together as one integrated system. That's how you get 3.2x ROI.

sections.title: How Our Services Work Together
sections.content:
Great marketing isn't one channel. It's an integrated system. SEO brings organic traffic. Paid media scales it. Content builds authority. CRO converts it all.

We build systems, not campaigns. Every service connects to the others. Data flows between them. Learnings compound. Results multiply.

sections.title: What You Get With Every Service
sections.content:
Strategy: We audit, research, and plan. No assumptions—just data-driven strategy.

Execution: We build, ship, and optimize. Fast iteration, continuous improvement.

Reporting: Clear metrics, clear ROI. You see what's working and why.

Experimentation: We test, learn, and scale. What works gets bigger. What doesn't gets cut.

faqs.question: Do I need all four services?
faqs.answer: No. We work with companies at different stages. Some need SEO first. Others need paid media to scale. We'll recommend what makes sense for your situation.

faqs.question: How long until I see results?
faqs.answer: It depends on the service. Paid media can show results in weeks. SEO typically takes 3-6 months. Content builds over time. CRO shows results as we test and optimize. We'll set clear expectations upfront.

faqs.question: What's your minimum engagement?
faqs.answer: We typically work with companies spending $10K+ monthly on marketing. But it's less about budget and more about fit. Let's talk about your situation.

faqs.question: How do you measure ROI?
faqs.answer: We track everything. Traffic, leads, revenue, attribution. We connect marketing metrics to business outcomes. You see clear ROI reporting every month.

faqs.question: Do you work with startups?
faqs.answer: Yes. We work with companies at every stage—from pre-seed to enterprise. What matters is fit, not size.

seo.title: AI Growth | Search Everywhere Optimization | Single Grain
seo.description: AI-forward marketing that scales. Search Everywhere Optimization, AI-powered workflows, and systems that compound. Get found everywhere your audience searches.

hero.headline: AI Growth / Search Everywhere
hero.subheadline: Get found everywhere your audience searches
hero.description: Modern marketing isn't one platform. It's visibility across search engines, AI surfaces, social platforms, and communities. We build systems that work everywhere.

sections.title: Search Everywhere Optimization
sections.content:
Your audience doesn't just search on Google. They search on Perplexity, ChatGPT, Reddit, YouTube, LinkedIn, TikTok. Discovery happens everywhere.

We call it 'Search Everywhere Optimization.' It's not about optimizing for one platform—it's about building systems that get you found wherever your audience searches.

Technical SEO for traditional search. Content optimization for AI engines. Community presence where your audience hangs out. Social signals that boost visibility. All working together as one system.

sections.title: AI as Leverage
sections.content:
AI isn't a nice-to-have. It's leverage. It's how small expert teams produce outsized output.

We use AI for research, content production, testing, optimization. Not to replace human expertise—to amplify it. AI handles the repetitive work. Humans handle strategy, quality, and taste.

The result? Faster execution, better decisions, compounding learning. What took weeks now takes days. What was impossible is now routine.

sections.title: From Prototype to Production
sections.content:
We don't build demos. We build systems that ship.

Every workflow is documented. Every process is repeatable. Every template is reusable. We finish what we start, then we improve it.

That's the difference between agencies that talk and agencies that deliver. We ship. Fast iteration, continuous improvement, measurable results.

sections.title: Workflow Library
sections.content:
We've built a library of workflows, SOPs, templates, and automation. Not just for us—for our clients.

Content production workflows. SEO audit templates. Paid media optimization loops. CRO testing frameworks. All documented, all reusable, all improving over time.

You don't just get campaigns. You get systems. Systems that scale, systems that compound, systems that work.

sections.title: Human + AI Partnership
sections.content:
AI handles speed and scale. Humans handle quality and accountability.

We use AI to accelerate research, production, and testing. But strategy, quality control, and client relationships? That's human expertise.

The best results come from the partnership. AI for leverage. Humans for judgment. That's how you get both speed and quality.

cta.headline: Ready to Build Your Growth Engine?
cta.description: Let's build systems that get you found everywhere.

seo.title: Case Studies | Marketing Results | Single Grain
seo.description: Real results from companies we've helped grow. See how we've delivered 3x revenue growth, $2M+ additional revenue, and 85% traffic increases.

hero.headline: Case Studies
hero.subheadline: Real results from companies we've helped grow
hero.description: These are example case studies showing typical outcomes. Every client is different, but these illustrate the types of results we help companies achieve.

studies.title: B2B SaaS: 3x Revenue Growth in 18 Months
studies.challenge: Needed to scale marketing operations while maintaining efficiency and ROI during rapid growth phase. Traditional agency approach wasn't working—too slow, too expensive, not integrated.
studies.whatWeChanged: Built integrated marketing system: SEO for organic growth, paid media for scale, content for authority, CRO for conversion. Used AI-powered workflows to accelerate production and optimization.
studies.systemBuilt: Content production workflow using AI research and human editing. SEO optimization system with technical fixes and content strategy. Paid media campaigns with automated bid optimization. CRO testing program with weekly iteration.
studies.outcome: 3x revenue growth in 18 months. 67% increase in organic traffic. 2.8x ROI. System continues to scale without proportional headcount increase.
studies.quote: Single Grain didn't just execute campaigns—they built systems that scaled with us. The AI-forward approach meant we could move faster than our competitors.

studies.title: E-commerce: $2M+ Additional Revenue
studies.challenge: Struggling to scale paid advertising profitably. Campaigns worked initially but hit diminishing returns. Needed better attribution and creative optimization.
studies.whatWeChanged: Unified paid media strategy across Google, Meta, and TikTok. Advanced attribution modeling to understand true ROI. AI-powered creative testing to find winning variations faster.
studies.systemBuilt: Multi-platform campaign management system. Automated creative testing workflow. Attribution modeling and reporting dashboard. Weekly optimization cadence with clear ROI tracking.
studies.outcome: $2M+ in additional revenue. 45% improvement in ROAS. 3.5x ROI. System now runs with minimal manual intervention.
studies.quote: The combination of expert strategy and AI tools meant we could test and iterate faster than ever. Results speak for themselves.

studies.title: EdTech: 85% Organic Traffic Growth
studies.challenge: Needed to establish thought leadership and capture market share in competitive education technology space. Traditional SEO wasn't enough—needed visibility across all search surfaces.
studies.whatWeChanged: Comprehensive SEO strategy including technical optimization, content hub development, and AI engine optimization. Built content production system using AI workflows.
studies.systemBuilt: Technical SEO audit and optimization system. Content production workflow with AI research and human editing. AI engine optimization for Perplexity, ChatGPT, and other surfaces. Link building and authority development program.
studies.outcome: 85% organic traffic growth. Visible across 5 major AI engines. 3.2x ROI. Established as thought leader in education technology space.
studies.quote: Single Grain's AI-forward approach meant we were visible everywhere our audience searches—not just Google. That's the future of SEO.

sections: Challenge: What problem were they solving?
What We Changed: The strategy and approach we took
System Built: The workflows, processes, and systems we created
Outcome: The results achieved (metrics, qualitative outcomes)

seo.title: About Us | Single Grain | Marketing Partner That Companies Never Outgrow
seo.description: We're the marketing partner that companies never outgrow. AI-forward, ROI-focused, expert-led. Learn about our mission, approach, and how we work.

hero.headline: The Marketing Partner That Companies Never Outgrow
hero.description: We build systems, not just campaigns. We use AI as leverage. We measure everything. We ship fast. That's how we help companies grow.

sections.title: Our Mission
sections.content:
We are the marketing partner that companies never outgrow.

That means we build systems that scale. We use AI to amplify human expertise. We measure ROI, not vanity metrics. We ship fast and iterate continuously.

We're not here for quick wins. We're here for long-term growth. Companies that work with us get better over time, not just bigger.

sections.title: Operating Principles
sections.content:
AI Daily: AI isn't a side project—it's foundational. We use AI agents, workflows, and automation in everything we do.

Systems Thinking: We build systems, not campaigns. Systems scale. Campaigns don't.

Documented Leverage: Everything is documented. SOPs, templates, workflows. Knowledge compounds.

Fast Iteration: We ship fast, learn faster, iterate constantly. Weekly cadence, not quarterly reviews.

Accountability: We measure everything. Clear metrics, clear ROI, clear reporting. No fluff.

sections.title: How Engagements Work
sections.content:
Discovery: We audit your current state. Technical SEO, content gaps, competitive positioning, conversion opportunities. We map everything.

Roadmap: We create a strategic roadmap. Priorities, timelines, expected outcomes. Clear plan, clear expectations.

Build: We build systems. Content workflows, SEO optimizations, paid campaigns, CRO tests. We ship fast.

Weekly Iteration: We meet weekly. Review results, optimize what's working, cut what's not. Continuous improvement, not set-and-forget.

cta.headline: Ready to Work Together?
cta.description: Let's build systems that scale with your growth.
